findings.description: PascalCase class `SystemAccountEntity` appears in the createReader code example but is absent from s2 hints.
findings.source_evidence: condition = new SystemAccountEntity(); — present in the createReader code block in source

findings.description: Four PascalCase class names that appear in the handle method code example are missing from s3 hints: `ExclusiveCtrlSystemAccountContext`, `CM311AC1Component`, `DeleteUserReportTempEntity`, `DeleteUserSendMessage`.
findings.source_evidence: new ExclusiveCtrlSystemAccountContext(...), new CM311AC1Component(), new DeleteUserReportTempEntity(userInfo), new DeleteUserSendMessage(userInfo) — all present in the handle() code block in source
